creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://github.com/unicode-org/icu/releases/tag/release-71-1 is ready. No API changes since RC1, so riding on the previous exp-run.

I wonder if semi-manual release tarballs would be ready before Thu 01:00 UTC build starts. Due to massive PORTREVISION bump it's desirable to land sooner to avoid blocking poudriere's package seeding too much.
